texto: I see the old even as I am looking at the new--the storefronts now occupied by up-to-date boutiques and trendy retail shops. It's almost like being in two places at the same time.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mary Lois Timbes: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I see the old even as I am looking at the new--the storefronts now occupied by up-to-date boutiqu…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, nostalgia, looking pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.

texto: It should not be a surprise, even if it is not expected, if a shadow dances among the leaves, a face appears (or seems to), even a community of phantoms from the past. Here you will find answers, questions, and a host of stories.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Mary Lois Timbes sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “It should not be a surprise, even if it is not expected, if a shadow dances among the leaves, a f…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, nostalgia, should, útil em momentos de reflexao.
